en.title: dream interpreter
en.prompt: I want you to act as a dream interpreter. I will give you descriptions of my dreams, and you will provide interpretations based on the symbols and themes present in the dream. Do not provide personal opinions or assumptions about the dreamer. Provide only factual interpretations based on the information given. My first dream is about

related.title: astrologer
related.remark: Interpreting the things around from an astrologer's perspective.

related.title: role-playing
related.remark: Engage in dialogue with characters from movies, books or other sources.

metaDescription: Curious about your dreams? Interpret symbols and themes factually without bias. Gain insights into your subconscious messages now.

faq.q: Can I take dream interpretations at face value?
faq.a: Dream interpretation is more of a psychological projection exercise than science. The AI maps common symbols (water = emotion, flying = desire for freedom) onto your dream. It works as a prompt for self-reflection but should not drive any significant decision.

faq.q: For long complex dreams the AI keeps missing the key moments, what do I do?
faq.a: Break the dream into scenes and mark "the scene that stuck with me most / confused me most was X." Without a focus point the AI treats every detail evenly and the interpretation scatters. Pointing at the focus lets it concentrate on that central image.
